field_mappings._comment_ean: MANUAL_ITERATION_REQUIRED: BeautifulSoup cannot use :has() or :contains(). The .specs-row selector requires manual iteration in code to find row where first .specs-data contains 'Barcode', then extract second .specs-data value. See configurable_supplier_scraper.py extract_ean() method for implementation.
title: h3.card-title
.card-title

category_page._comment_pagination: Site uses LOAD MORE button with JavaScript click handler (no href). Button selector: a.btn-load-more. Requires next_button_javascript for clicking.

pagination.next_button_javascript: (() => { const loadMoreBtn = document.querySelector('a.btn-load-more'); if (loadMoreBtn && loadMoreBtn.offsetParent !== null) { loadMoreBtn.click(); return true; } else { return false; } })()
